testing_progress.highlight: bal-devnet-7 stable with 100% EVM fuzzing participation; still used for benchmarking
Spec change from execution-specs PR #2892 deferred to Glamsterdam devnet 5 to avoid breaking bal-devnet-7
Glamsterdam devnet 5 scope and timeline to be set at ACDT on Monday; targeting ~2 weeks out

repricing_updates.highlight: EIP-7904: all clients except Geth exceed 100 Mgas/s anchor; Geth optimizations expected next week
EIP-7904 likely to become informational EIP (no repricing needed; all clients meet threshold)
EIP-8038: Erigon and Besu still underperforming; Reth benchmarking issue under investigation; optimizations ongoing
EIP-2780 benchmarking in progress; results not yet stable; depends on ZFS/MDBX disk format affecting Erigon and Reth

eip_spec_updates.highlight: EIP-8037 PR: calldata floor gas accounting fix (aligns with EIP-7778) ready to merge after pseudocode update
EIP-8037 PR: Gary's EIP-7702 authorization refund extension needs broader discussion at ACDT before inclusion
EIP-2780 simplification proposed: remove precompile target and self-transfer edge cases; defer until final benchmark numbers

organizational.highlight: Glamsterdam repricing breakout calls to be discontinued; discussions moving entirely to ACDT

action_items.action: Discuss Gary's EIP-7702 authorization refund PR (EIPs #11715) at ACDT before including in devnet 5

decisions.decision: Execution-specs PR #2892 spec change moved to Glamsterdam devnet 5; not applied to bal-devnet-7
EIP-8037 calldata floor accounting PR (EIPs #11706) to be merged after pseudocode update; Gary's PR deferred
Glamsterdam repricing breakout series ending; all future discussions on ACDT

targets.target: Monday ACDT: finalize Glamsterdam devnet 5 scope and timeline (~2 weeks to launch)
